response.justification: Candidate is significantly overqualified for an entry-level role, with 15+ years of fullstack experience including TypeScript, Node.js, React-adjacent frameworks, and AWS. Strong match on technical requirements and Berlin location supports the on-site requirement. Main risk is seniority mismatch — they may be bored, expect higher compensation, or leave quickly for a senior role.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js experience plus AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes exposure
Berlin-based, satisfying high on-site presence requirement
Strong fullstack breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and DevOps with craftsmanship mindset (TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior background vs. junior/mid posting creates retention and compensation risk
Resume lists MongoDB and SQL but no explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience
Only basic German, which may matter for an on-site role in German renewable energy/construction sector
